title: Dragons of the Cosmos (Isle of Berk Addon)
description: Addon for the Isle of Berk Mod, Dragons of the Cosmos adds 10+ new variants.
body:
# Overview
Dragons of the Cosmos adds 13 unique re-skinned cosmic dragon variants.

![Dragons of the Cosmos SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SsYtMfSi/images/f1d7f5adfa9cfe31daa6c7322caff82ae4009669.png)
# Important
- Isle of Berk Mod
- Isle of Berk Variant Loader Mod
- Archipelago Additions Mod
> These are all required dependencies, if these are not installed Dragons of the Cosmos won't work.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-of-the-cosmos)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragons-of-the-cosmos)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

# Recommended Modpack(s) 
- [**Claws of Berk**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/new-berks-dawn)
- [**Scales and Skies**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/scales-and-skies)
- [**Across the Archipelago**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/across-the-archipelago)

## [Mod Discord](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
